issues.title: Double tasks generated for Loan Simple leads in pre-referral and post-referral workflows
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were receiving duplicate tasks across multiple workflows including pre-referral and post-referral. The issue was traced to a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations in HubSpot. HubSpot support was engaged and confirmed a fix.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually close or delete the duplicate tasks.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not stopping when deal marked Closed Lost
issues.desc: HAs continued receiving post-referral workflow check-in tasks even after deals were marked as Closed Lost or Transferred. The workflow lacked proper unenrollment filters for terminal deal stages. A tweak to the filters was applied to resolve the issue.
issues.workaround: Manually unenroll any Closed Lost or Transferred deals still showing active workflow tasks and dismiss any erroneous tasks received during the impact window.

issues.title: Automated emails sending with previous loan officer's info after LO change
issues.desc: When a loan officer was changed on a deal, automated emails continued to reference the previous LO rather than the newly assigned one. This affected agent-facing emails that displayed incorrect LO contact information. The issue was resolved by Luis as a product-side fix.
issues.workaround: For deals where the LO was changed during the impact window, manually resend any agent-facing emails to ensure the correct LO information is communicated.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-triggering TC tasks when deal stage toggled back to Offer Accepted
issues.desc: When a deal was moved to Offer Accepted, then back to a prior stage, and then back to Offer Accepted again, the TC workflow tasks did not re-trigger on the second transition. This was because 'deal stage = Offer Accepted' was not listed as a re-enrollment criterion in the workflow. The re-enrollment criteria was updated to include the Offer Accepted stage.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any deals that went through a stage toggle back to Offer Accepted and did not receive TC tasks during the impact window.

issues.title: MRC deals marked Offer Accepted not enrolling TCs into workflow tasks
issues.desc: MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted were not triggering the TC workflow, leaving TCs without tasks and closing coordination falling through. HubSpot support was engaged and identified the root cause, after which the issue was confirmed fixed. Deals that had been marked Offer Accepted before the fix were not retroactively corrected.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any MRC deals marked Offer Accepted between the impact window dates into the TC workflow and send any closing info collection emails manually.
